version_description: Lower key of the original song of El Debarge.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Always Something There To Remind Me

content:
[Intro]
[ch]A2[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]F#m7[/ch] (2x)

[Verse]
[tab][ch]A2[/ch]           [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]
Sometimes a love won't let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]A2[/ch]           [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
Hard as I try I know it shows[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Everybody's telling me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
You'll be over her eventually[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]C#7sus[/ch]  [ch]Db9[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Eadd9[/ch]
But how am I supposed to feel so secure[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]F#sus[/ch]
When I keep wonderin'[/tab]
Who's holding Donna now
[tab]         [ch]Gbsus2[/ch]
And I keep wonderin'[/tab]
Who's heart she's knocking around
[tab]              [ch]C#m7[/ch]          [ch]F#7[/ch]
There's nothing I wouldn't do[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]          [ch]F#7[/ch]     [ch]F#sus[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Eadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
To be in her shoes somehow[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#sus[/ch]
And I keep wonderin'[/tab]
Who's holding Donna now
[tab]          [ch]Gbsus2[/ch]
And I keep wonderin'[/tab]
What magic can be found
[tab]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]          [ch]F#7[/ch]
To turn me back to the one[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C#m7[/ch]          [ch]F#7[/ch]     [ch]F#sus[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Eadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Who's holding Donna now[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]A2[/ch]           [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]
The letter started with goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]A2[/ch]           [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
I've read it half a million times[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Tell me this is just a dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]      [ch]F#m7[/ch]
When I wake up she'll be here next to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]C#7sus[/ch]  [ch]Db9[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Eadd9[/ch]
Tell me it will be just the way it was, oh[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]F#sus[/ch]
When I keep wonderin'[/tab]
Who's holding Donna now
[tab]         [ch]Gbsus2[/ch]
And I keep wonderin'[/tab]
Who's heart she's knocking around
[tab]              [ch]C#m7[/ch]          [ch]F#7[/ch]
There's nothing I wouldn't do[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]          [ch]F#7[/ch]     [ch]F#sus[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Eadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
To be in her shoes somehow[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#sus[/ch]
And I keep wonderin'[/tab]
Who's holding Donna now
[tab]          [ch]Gbsus2[/ch]
And I keep wonderin'[/tab]
What magic can be found
[tab]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]          [ch]F#7[/ch]
To turn me back to the one[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C#m7[/ch]          [ch]F#7[/ch]     [ch]F#sus[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Eadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Who's holding Donna now[/tab]
